HomePage.title: Agent Workflow Hub
HomePage.hero_subtitle: Stop feeding AI your entire codebase. Eliminate context bloat, cure AI amnesia, and enforce pixel-perfect UI consistency with a memory-persistent architecture built for enterprise scale.
HomePage.feature_1_desc: Don't waste thousands of tokens on irrelevant files. Our proprietary STATE.md architecture creates a hyper-focused, lightweight RAM that keeps your AI lightning fast and relentlessly accurate.
HomePage.feature_1_prob: Traditional chats collapse under massive context windows.
HomePage.feature_1_sol: A strict 20-line state file guarantees maximum performance.
HomePage.feature_2_desc: Never explain your project rules again. Our seamless One-Click Handoff engine perfectly encapsulates architectural decisions, bug histories, and ongoing tasks across unlimited chat sessions.
HomePage.feature_2_prob: Starting a new session resets your AI's brain completely.
HomePage.feature_2_sol: State preservation ensures zero loss of critical context.
HomePage.feature_3_desc: Lock down your Design System. The protocol forces the AI to strictly ingest and adhere to your UI guidelines before it is allowed to touch a single line of frontend code.
HomePage.feature_3_prob: Autonomous agents hallucinate colors and destroy layouts.
HomePage.feature_3_sol: Design tokens enforce absolute visual conformity.
HomePage.feature_4_desc: Execute autonomous code with absolute confidence. Our framework features recursive Git Hooks and OS-level write locks to prevent catastrophic file corruption and API key leaks.
HomePage.feature_4_prob: Raw AI agents accidentally expose secrets or overwrite critical files.
HomePage.feature_4_sol: Multi-layered safety protocols guard your repository 24/7.
HomePage.portfolio_subtitle: Discover the enterprise-grade tools, workflows, and frameworks engineered to accelerate autonomous development.
HomePage.project_1_desc: The flagship memory-persistent framework to eliminate context amnesia for AI agents.
HomePage.project_2_desc: A radically modern content management infrastructure built natively on Next.js.
HomePage.project_3_desc: The definitive hub for discovering and installing Model Context Protocol servers.

ManualPage.title: Technical Documentation
ManualPage.subtitle: A comprehensive, CMS-grade reference manual for deploying, orchestrating, and mastering the Agent Workflow Framework in enterprise environments.
ManualPage.problems_p1: When engineering software at an enterprise scale utilizing autonomous AI assistants, engineering teams inevitably encounter severe degradation in AI reasoning. This is not a model limitation, but a systemic architectural failure. We define these critical bottlenecks as follows:
ManualPage.problems_li1: Context Collapse (The Token Tax): As a chat session elongates, the sheer volume of code, logs, and conversational history overwhelms the LLM's context window. This leads to hallucination, forgotten variables, and exponential API cost inflation without yield.
ManualPage.problems_li2: Amnesia (The Handoff Failure): To fix Context Collapse, developers wipe the session. However, this instantly lobotomizes the AI. All micro-decisions, architectural context, bug discoveries, and learned behaviors are completely annihilated.
ManualPage.problems_li3: Design Drift (The Entropy Engine): Without hard-coded visual constraints, an AI will attempt to invent new CSS classes, hallucinate Tailwind utility combinations, and ultimately destroy the visual consistency of your application layer.
ManualPage.problems_p2: The Agent Workflow Protocol systematically eradicates these failures through a rigidly enforced, persistent state machine:
ManualPage.problems_sol1: The STATE.md Engine: We isolate the AI's 'RAM' into a highly-compressed, constantly updating markdown file. The AI reads this single source of truth instead of scraping thousands of lines of conversational history.
ManualPage.problems_sol2: Handoff Orchestration: When a session degrades, our scripts compress the current vector and inject it into a pristine, zero-token session, ensuring infinite development loops without memory loss.
ManualPage.problems_sol3: RAG Offloading via MCP: Massive API documentation and architecture diagrams are strictly prohibited from the IDE context. They are instead offloaded to Google NotebookLM, queried dynamically via the Model Context Protocol.
ManualPage.notebooklm_p1: The greatest mistake in AI-assisted coding is pasting external documentation directly into the IDE prompt. This paralyzes the local agent. Our framework establishes a secure bridge to Google NotebookLM, utilizing it as a dedicated, high-capacity external brain.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li1: Token Decoupling: Offloads gigabytes of PDF documentation, API specs, and legacy codebases away from your expensive IDE context window.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li2: Laser Focus: By isolating external knowledge, your local agent maintains absolute, unadulterated focus on manipulating the active source code, reducing syntax errors by up to 80%.
ManualPage.notebooklm_li3: Semantic Retrieval: Leverages Google's advanced RAG capabilities to instantly fetch complex answers from your external knowledge base exactly when the IDE agent requests it.
ManualPage.security_p1: Granting autonomous read/write access to an AI agent poses significant existential risks to your repository. We implement military-grade safety mechanisms to ensure your code and secrets remain uncompromised.
ManualPage.security_li1: OS-Level File Operations: Agents are strictly prohibited from executing raw `rm` or `cat` commands. All file modifications are routed through verified tooling that forces randomized temp-file creation and OS-level write-locks to prevent race conditions or catastrophic overwrites.
ManualPage.security_li2: Heuristic Secret Scanning: Pre-commit git hooks actively scan for high-entropy strings, AWS keys, JWT tokens, and `.env` exposures, immediately terminating the agent's execution if a leak is detected.
ManualPage.structure_code:
/ (Root Project)
├── .ai/
│   ├── STATE.md                    # The Core RAM: Active task state machine
│   ├── REFLECTIONS.md              # Historical Database: Bug fixes & critical learnings
│   ├── DECISIONS.md                # Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
│   ├── templates/                  # Boilerplate blueprints for rapid scaffolding
│   ├── prompts/                    # Bootstrap instructions for session instantiation
│   └── docs/                       # Hyper-compressed project knowledge base
├── ai-protocol.sh                   # The CLI Orchestration Engine
└── SKILL.md                         # The Prime Directive: Core agent ruleset
ManualPage.guidelines_li1: API Contract-First Methodology: Agents must verify and establish strict schema definitions before writing backend or frontend implementations.
ManualPage.guidelines_li2: Test-Driven Development (TDD): Any logic exceeding standard complexity requires the agent to draft and execute test suites prior to integrating the code into the main branch.
ManualPage.guidelines_li3: Zero-Trust Security: Hardcoded secrets or credentials within the codebase are strictly prohibited. Agents must rely exclusively on environment variable injection and secure vaults.
ManualPage.guidelines_li4: Mandatory Initialization: Upon any session boot, the agent's first action must be reading the `.ai/STATE.md` file. Failure to do so results in protocol violation.
ManualPage.guidelines_li5: Architectural Logging: Any significant shift in architecture, library choice, or database schema must be immediately logged inside `.ai/DECISIONS.md`.
ManualPage.themes_p1: Visual consistency is managed by the `.ai/templates/ui/` directory. By locking the design system into a markdown template, the AI is constrained to a specific set of design tokens.
ManualPage.themes_li1: Futuristic: Dark mode, heavy glassmorphism, glowing auras, space-themed aesthetics. (Default)
ManualPage.themes_li2: Data Heavy: Inspired by Tremor.so. Clean tables, minimal borders, optimized for dense data visualization and dashboards.
ManualPage.themes_li3: Minimal: Inspired by Vercel. Pure black & white, extremely high contrast, stark typography, zero gradients.
ManualPage.themes_li4: Vibrant: Inspired by HeroUI. Colorful, soft rounded corners, dynamic micro-animations, highly engaging.
ManualPage.themes_code:
# Command to switch the global UI theme constraints
cp .ai/templates/ui/minimal.md .ai/docs/ui_guidelines.md
ManualPage.script_p1: The `ai-protocol.sh` script is the beating heart of the framework. It provides a suite of CLI tools designed to manage the agent lifecycle effortlessly.
ManualPage.script_code:
# Execute a full sweep of safety diagnostics and linting
./ai-protocol.sh check

# Safely archive the current STATE.md and prepare a clean slate
./ai-protocol.sh clean

# Compile the ultimate session handoff prompt to avoid Amnesia
./ai-protocol.sh handoff
ManualPage.workflow_li1: Load the initialization prompt located at `.ai/prompts/01-session-start.md`.
ManualPage.workflow_li2: Inject these exact instructions into a fresh, empty AI session within your IDE.
ManualPage.workflow_li3: The agent will automatically locate, read, and internalize `STATE.md`, resuming work precisely where the previous session ended.
ManualPage.workflow_li4: When the context window begins to bloat and response times degrade, immediately run `./ai-protocol.sh handoff` in your terminal.
ManualPage.workflow_li5: Destroy the bloated, degraded IDE session without hesitation.
ManualPage.workflow_li6: Copy the newly generated handoff manifest and use it to bootstrap Phase 1, creating an infinite, lossless development loop.
